top_signals.title: Oil Jumps, Stock Futures Fall as US Strikes Iran: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil jumped and US stock futures retreated after American forces launched fresh strikes on Iran, reigniting a conflict that has upended global markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Energy Prices Drive U.S. Inflation To Three-Year High
top_signals.summary: U.S. inflation climbed above 4% for the first time in three years in May as rising energy costs tied to the Iran war pushed consumer costs sharply higher, with the Consumer Price Index rising 0.5% from April and 4.2% from a year earlier, according to data released Wednesday by the Bureau of Labor Statistics.  The annual rate matched economists’ expectations but marked the highest inflation reading since April 2023 and an acceleration from the 3.8% rate recorded in April. Energy was by far the largest contributor to the increase. The…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: How AI Is Changing Asia’s Workplaces
top_signals.summary: Financial heavyweights in Hong Kong including Baidu CFO Henry He and BlackRock's APAC Head Susan Chan share their insights on how AI is changing their workplaces. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Scientists Create Giant Fire Tornadoes To Clean Up Oil Spills
top_signals.summary: Oil spills are some of the most destructive forms of marine pollution known to man, thanks to their acute toxicity and ability to devastate marine habitats. The BP Plc. (NYSE:BP) Deepwater Horizon spill in 2010 ranks as one of the worst accidental oil spills in history, having released over 134 million gallons (~4.9 million barrels) of oil into the Gulf of Mexico over a period of 87 days. The spill is estimated to have caused $17.2 billion in natural resource damages; killed ~1 million birds, hundreds of thousands of sea turtles and billions of…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
